title: Dense Russian Broccoli Stew
description: A hearty and comforting vegetarian stew featuring purple-sprouting-broccoli, rendered in a claypot with a rich and savory broth.
instructions: Heat the rendered fat in the claypot over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the chopped carrot and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Add the chopped potato, vegetable broth, tomato paste, and dried thyme, stirring to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 20 minutes.
Add the chopped purple-sprouting-broccoli to the claypot and continue to simmer for an additional 10 minutes.
Season the stew with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve the stew hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
